CustomField.description: Created this hidden fied due to Formula size limit issue for Amount (Invoiced) field.
CustomField.formula: CASE(TEXT(leaseworks__Transaction_Type__c) ,'MR Contribution Applied', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Event_Payable__c),0,IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Pending'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Declined'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Submitted'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Cancelled')),null,leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Lessor_Contribution_Committed__c)) ,'MR Claim', IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Pending'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Declined'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Submitted'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Cancelled')),null,leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Payable_Amount__c* (-1)) ,'MR Lessor Commitment Amount Applied', IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Event_Payable__c),0,IF(OR(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Pending'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Declined'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Submitted'),ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Status__c,'Cancelled')),null,leaseworks__Event_Payable__r.leaseworks__Lessor_Commitment_Amount__c)) ,null)
CustomField.label: _MR Claim Calculation
